Name: EASTMAN EID 013 Impact Drill 13mm Chuck 600W Power Variable Speed Reversible Hammer 3 Free Bits Carbon Set Concrete Wood Metal
Description: HIGH-PERFORMANCE 600W IMPACT MOTOR: Solves the challenge of drilling into hard materials; the powerful 600W motor combined with an impact function allows you to bore holes into concrete, brick, and stone walls where regular drills fail. COMPLETE STARTER BIT KIT: No need to buy accessories separately; this package solves the "ready-to-use" problem by including 3 Free Drill Bits specifically for Masonry (6mm), Wood (6mm), and Twisted (6mm) applications. VARIABLE SPEED & REVERSE ACTION: Prevent damage to delicate materials; the trigger-controlled speed (0-2800 RPM) and forward/reverse switch give you total control, allowing for clean starts on smooth tiles and easy screw removal. ROBUST 13MM CHUCK CAPACITY: The solution for larger projects; the 13mm chuck size accommodates larger shank bits, giving you the flexibility to drill wider and deeper holes for heavy-duty anchors and plumbing installations.
